response.justification: Exceeds seniority and experience requirements with 20 years of software engineering across diverse domains, but lacks the deep AI expertise and strategic advisory experience the role emphasizes. Recent involvement with AI-agent infrastructure (MCP) shows directional interest, but insufficient portfolio of AI-powered products or platform expertise to fill a Principal Engineer—AI Strategy role at this level.
strengths: Exceeds 15-year requirement with 20 years of full-stack experience across web, mobile, infrastructure, and emerging AI domains
Demonstrated leadership through IC staff roles, open-source platform founding (GISCollective), and mentorship (workshops, courses, dojos)
Recent engagement with AI infrastructure (MCP code generators) and multi-stack builder mindset shows technical adaptability
concerns: AI expertise is nascent (less than 2 years in current role); no demonstrated AI product portfolio, ML background, or recognized expertise in the field
Career focus on technical craftsmanship and IC work rather than strategic customer advisory or platform strategy leadership
Limited evidence of cloud platform architecture or strategy experience; AWS CDK exposure is recent and operational rather than architectural

key_factors.factor: Shallow AI expertise relative to role focus
Limited strategic customer or platform advisory experience
